title: The team behind Dark Sky launches a weather app for uncertain, low-trust times
description: This seems fitting for a time when a lot of Americans aren’t sure what to trust and say it’s important to do their own research: A weather app from the folks behind the beloved app Dark Sky (sold to Apple in 2022) that embraces uncertainty. The app is called Acme Weather. From their blog post:...
